underlying_goal: Implement a multi-phase plan to enhance an AI assistant app's frontend: expand onboarding flow, add Vision settings UI/store, add Consciousness dashboard, and set up smart defaults with auto-enable for new users
friction_detail: Type check revealed unused variables in two files that needed minor fixes, and stale build artifacts required rebuilding plugin-protocol before types resolved.
brief_summary: User asked Claude to implement a 4-phase frontend enhancement plan (onboarding, vision settings, consciousness dashboard, defaults); Claude created/modified 16 files across multiple packages, fixed type errors, passed all checks, and committed successfully.
